name: Horseradish-Garlic Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a barbecue or stovetop grill to very hot.
2. Combine beef, horseradish, garlic paste, and herbs in a bowl. Mix well and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal portions and form firm, round patties that are about 1-inch thick.
4. Place the patties on the hot grill and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, slice the buns in half and brush each side with butter.
6. Flip the burgers and continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
7. Place the buns, butter side down, on the cooler part of the grill and toast until lightly browned.
8. Top each burger with a slice of havarti cheese and continue cooking until the cheese melts.
9. Assemble the burgers and serve them with fried waffle-cut potatoes.
Yield: 2 servings
